title: Fermented Birria Tacos
description: A twist on traditional birria, this recipe combines fermented flavors with the spices and richness of Mexican cuisine.
instructions: Brown the birria meat in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the Mexican oregano, cumin, and dried ancho chilies to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add 2 cups of water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Shred the fermented cabbage and add it to the pot.
Season the birria with salt to taste.
Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the birria onto a tortilla and topping with yogurt and a squeeze of lime juice.
